workflow_instructions: Back-to-back issue loop 304→310 (PRD-0006 voucher/campaign). On SessionStart resume: 1) Read this file. 2) Check open PRs from claude/resolve-issues-304-310-1CDY9 → main; merge any green ones first. 3) Look at `current` below: if `stage=implementing`, check git log for new commits or recheck the agent state; if `stage=qa`, spawn QA agent; if `stage=pr_open`, poll `mcp__github__pull_request_read get_check_runs` until conclusion known; if `stage=merging`, merge then close issue; if `stage=done` move to `next_issue`. 4) After each merge: reset branch to main (`git fetch origin main && git reset --hard origin/main && git push -f origin claude/resolve-issues-304-310-1CDY9`), then fan out next subagent. 5) Update this file at every state transition. 6) Stop when `next_issue > 310`.
next_action: Wait for issue #305 implementation subagent to finish. Then: QA verify → create PR → wait CI green → merge → reset branch → start #306.
